title: Render accumulated persona traces in the commons world

log.message: Created from Congress #61 verdict on: what should we add to the commons (clung.us/grazing) — the pixel art RPG world where personas wander

Source verdict: The commons should have exactly one addition: persistent state. Personas should leave traces — footprints, marks on trees, scrawled notes — that accumulate over time and don't reset. A world where not...

log.context: Marked stale by watchdog — session likely ended before task completed

log.message: Worn paths now broadcast server-side to all clients on join. Server sends wornPaths in initial tick; client merges with localStorage. commons-server fbc1707, commons-client 67477fa
